```{r enrichment}
#| results: "asis"
#| echo: false
if (session == 4) {
  # quiet = TRUE prevents the "Processing..." logs from cluttering your output
  cat(knitr::knit_child("slides/enrichment/r_review.qmd", quiet = TRUE))
} else if(session == 8){
  cat(knitr::knit_child("slides/enrichment/sql.qmd", quiet = TRUE))
} else if(session == 13){
  cat(knitr::knit_child("slides/enrichment/purrr.qmd", quiet = TRUE))
}
```
